extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIČ attacked with approximately 1.8km remaining on Col de Porte, dropped BERNAL and held off PINOT by 8 seconds.
tactical_patterns: CASTROVIEJO paced BERNAL's group until ALAPHILIPPE cracked early, exposing Ineos's willingness to sacrifice domestiques before decisive moments.
BUCHMANN attacked at 3km forcing SIVAKOV to chase, strategically depleting Ineos before ROGLIČ's winning move at 1.8km remaining.
Jumbo set tempo through KUSS then ROGLIČ attacked only after rivals (LANDA, QUINTANA, BUCHMANN) had already probed unsuccessfully.
PORTE bridged multiple accelerations but cracked when ROGLIČ launched, suggesting bridging efforts cost more than sitting wheels on steepest gradients.

rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: waited for all rivals to attack first, then soloed to victory with decisive acceleration at 1.8km showing superior pacing discipline
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: unable to respond when ROGLIČ attacked, suggesting fitness below 2019 form despite Ineos controlling early climb
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: negative: described as 'couldn't do a turn' and sat in wheels entire climb, raising questions about Tour selection
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: positive: limited losses to 8 seconds after chasing ROGLIČ alone, best GC response from non-Jumbo riders
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: negative: dropped before final kilometers described as 'big surprise' indicating unexpected weakness on long climbs
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: neutral: crashed early in yellow jersey but completed pacing duties before abandoning on climb as planned
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: negative: dropped very early on climb from near front to back in under 1km, confirming poor form from stage 1
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: positive: bridged multiple attacks and remained contender until ROGLIČ's final acceleration, unexpected top-10 GC form
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: positive: attacked multiple times including late acceleration, finished fifth showing climbing legs despite no final response
rider_signals.BUCHMANN Emanuel: positive: tactical attack at 3km forced Ineos domestiques to chase, finished third showing Tour preparation progressing
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: positive: paced group hard enough to drop SIVAKOV before ROGLIČ's attack, key Jumbo tactical domestique role
rider_signals.VAN GARDEREN Tejay: negative: described as 'cracked' and dropped before final kilometers despite Trek positioning
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: negative: dropped significantly before finale, losing considerable time on main GC group
